name: JUMP: Single-Pass Membership Inference on Fine-Tuned Diffusion Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.16207v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) test whether a candidate example appeared in a model's training data. We study MIAs for fine-tuned discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), where membership means inclusion in the target model's fine-tuning set. Unlike autoregressive language models, dLLMs allow an attacker to choose arbitrary mask sets and o...
